displayName: Rubber/Elastomer Interlayer (T-72 reflecting plate, spall coating)
notes: Armor-grade rubber/elastomer interlayer. Density ~1.1-1.3 g/cm³, Shore A ~70. RHAe ~0.01-0.02 per mm vs KE. Used as intermediate layer in Soviet composite armor (T-72 reflecting plate between steel layers) and as spall coating on interior hull surfaces. Elastic behavior absorbs and deflects fragments. Negligible direct ballistic resistance but disrupts long-rod penetrator through wave impedance mismatch.
